overall.description: A third-person game engine video showing a female character walking through a rocky canyon path that opens into the historic Château de Vincennes plaza. The environment features high-quality photogrammetry textures with a mix of natural rock formations and historic stone architecture under bright summer sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon nature trail with steep cliff walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow rocky canyon path, flanked by tall stone walls and scattered trees

entered.detail: tall weathered rock formation with rough texture forming the canyon wall
steep rock face with layered sedimentary textures casting shadows
unpaved path with packed earth and scattered small stones
green leafy trees growing at the base of the cliff providing shade

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow rocky canyon with steep cliff walls on both sides. The dirt trail winds between the rocks and scattered trees, with dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy above.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from canyon to open historic plaza

events.description: text overlay 'CHÂTEAU DE VINCENNES' appears as the canyon opens into the historic plaza
exiting the shaded canyon into bright open sunlight of the plaza

agents.ego_description: approaching the canyon exit with the historic chateau becoming visible in the distance

entered.detail: large historic stone fortress with medieval architecture visible at the canyon exit
tall thin vertical modern art installation rising from the plaza ground
wide open paved area replacing the narrow dirt trail

segments.scene_description: The canyon walls recede as the character approaches the exit, revealing the historic Château de Vincennes ahead. The environment transitions from enclosed rocky terrain to an open plaza with a distinctive tall sculpture visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic chateau plaza with modern sculpture installation

events.description: character slows and turns to the right to view the chateau from different angles

agents.ego_description: walking around the open plaza, circling the tall sculpture and observing the historic architecture from multiple viewpoints

entered.detail: gothic style stone chapel with pointed arches and ornate facade
dense green forest forming the horizon boundary of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character explores the vast open plaza surrounding the Château de Vincennes, walking past the tall modern sculpture and admiring the medieval stone architecture. The camera circles to show different angles of the historic buildings against the bright blue sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a secluded, narrow canyon into the expansive, sun-drenched plaza of the Château de Vincennes. It begins by trailing a character along a winding dirt path enclosed by steep cliff walls, where dappled sunlight filters through a canopy of scattered trees. As the character advances, the rocky walls gradually recede and the terrain opens up, revealing the historic stone architecture of the château and a distant, tall sculpture. The scene then expands into the vast open plaza, moving past the modern sculpture to showcase the medieval buildings. Finally, the camera circles through the space to capture the contrast of the ancient stone structures against a bright, clear blue sky.
